title: dryopteris reptans
intro: Dryopteris reptans, also known as interrupted fern or shield fern, is a perennial, deciduous fern native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce pain, swelling, and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Dryopteris reptans include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as arthritis, gout, and eczema, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris reptans include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
